channel.title: GitHub Copilot Bulletin — English / Biweekly / Devs
channel.description: Latest GitHub Copilot updates for Devs (Biweekly, English)

item.title: Copilot Bulletin Biweekly #2 — March 10 to March 24, 2026 · Devs Edition
item.description: Over the past two weeks, the dominant theme was the rapid maturation of Copilot's background coding agent. Startup is 50% faster, sessions are more transparent, and teams now have fine-grained control over validation tools. Combined with new model releases expanding options across IDEs, this period marks a clear shift: Copilot coding agent is no longer early-stage—it's becoming a reliable daily driver.

item.title: Copilot Bulletin Biweekly #1 — March 2 to March 16, 2026 · Devs Edition
item.description: The past two weeks mark a turning point in Copilot's agentic capabilities. Both VS Code and JetBrains IDEs shipped major agent upgrades — hooks, plugins, memory sharing, custom agents — while GPT-5.4 landed with stronger multi-step reasoning. Copilot is moving from code assistant to programmable development partner.
